title: Multi-Clinic Paid Claims Consolidation From eCW PDF Reports (ALL_CLAIM + PAYMENT + RECEIVABLES)
summary: End-to-end pipeline that consolidates three eCW v12 PDF reports (ALL CLAIM, PAYMENT DETAIL, RECEIVABLES) across 11 clinics × 3 months into a single Excel workbook with 9 sheets (Claims_Detail, Payments_Detail, Receivables_Checks, Summary_Provider_Month, Summary_Insurance_Month, Reconciliation, Master_Enriched, Flags, README). Includes check-level PMT↔REC reconciliation (cuadra a $0 en 31/32 combinaciones), service-line LEFT JOIN AC↔PMT, parallel multiprocessing with pickle cache, scanned-PDF detection, and resilience against two distinct eCW report-header formats (APR-style vs FEB-style label drift). Run against 99 PDFs produces 10,612 Claims rows + 9,866 Payment rows + 1,281 Checks in ~5-7 min cold, <15s warm.
